description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the default Ruby environment and runs a before_script that prints the Ruby version, shows the Ruby path, installs bundler with gem install bundler --no-ri --no-rdoc, and runs bundle install with parallel jobs using $(nproc) and any FLAGS. Define a single job named fpm_build (default stage) that executes bundle exec rake package64_jessie to build a Debian Jessie package, and configure the job to keep all untracked files as artifacts. No additional stages, caches, or rules are required.
